github.description: GitHub MCP server — used by deployment-agent to create PRs, check CI status, manage branch protection rules

azure-sql.description: Azure MCP server — used by foundation-agent to inspect SQL resources, monitor migration runner job status
azure-sql.notes: Uses Managed Identity / OIDC — no client secret required

filesystem.description: Local filesystem access — scoped to the PulseOne repo root only

microsoft-learn.description: Microsoft Learn documentation — used by all agents to look up current Azure SDK, EF Core 10, and .NET 10 API references

notes.secrets: All MCP server credentials are passed via environment variables. NEVER hardcode tokens in this file.
notes.scope: The filesystem server is scoped to e:/GITHUB/PulseOne — it cannot access files outside the project.
notes.azure-auth: Azure MCP server uses OIDC federated identity (AZURE_CLIENT_ID with no AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET). Configure in Azure AD app registration.
notes.github-pat: GITHUB_PAT requires: repo, workflow, read:org scopes for the deployment agent's PR and CI operations.
